name: Angular Material
description: Official Material Design component library for Angular applications

description.value: Official Material Design component library for Angular applications

active-maintenance.comment: Highly active with 14,799 commits, 818 contributors; latest v21.0.5 released December 18, 2025

initial-release.comment: Repository created January 4, 2016; initially named angular/material2

styling-approach.comment: Uses SCSS/Sass with Sass API for customization; Material Design 3 system tokens via CSS custom properties

component-model.comment: Fully styled Material Design components; also provides CDK for building custom unstyled components

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (80.9% of codebase) with first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Full SSR support starting from v18; works with Angular's built-in SSR via @angular/ssr package

design-system.comment: Implements Google's Material Design specification; updated to Material Design 3 (M3)

dark-mode.comment: Built-in support via CSS variables structure; theme switching by altering --mat-sys-* values

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive Material Design 3 theming with color tokens, typography, elevation, and corner radius tokens

css-variables.comment: Material Design 3 system tokens via CSS custom properties (--mat-sys-*) for colors, typography, elevation

design-tokens.comment: Extensive design tokens: color (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, surface), typography (11 styles), elevation (5 levels), corner radius

rtl-support.comment: CDK bidi module provides bidirectional text support; components support RTL layouts

component-count.comment: 36 component modules: autocomplete, badge, bottom-sheet, button, button-toggle, card, checkbox, chips, datepicker, dialog, divider, expansion, form-field, grid-list, icon, input, list, menu, paginator, progress-bar, progress-spinner, radio, select, sidenav, slide-toggle, slider, snack-bar, sort, stepper, table, tabs, timepicker, toolbar, tooltip, tree

text-input.comment: matInput directive for text, password, email, search, number, tel, url types within mat-form-field

textarea.comment: matInput directive works with textarea element; supports cdkTextareaAutosize for auto-resize

select.comment: mat-select component for single-select dropdowns with mat-option elements

multi-select.comment: mat-select with multiple attribute for multi-selection support

combobox.comment: mat-autocomplete provides searchable/filterable select with autocomplete functionality

checkbox.comment: mat-checkbox component with indeterminate state support

slider.comment: mat-slider with single and range (dual thumb) support

number-input.comment: Uses matInput with type='number'; no dedicated number input with increment/decrement buttons

tag-input.comment: mat-chip-grid with mat-chip-row for editable chip lists with add/remove functionality

pin-input.comment: No built-in OTP/PIN code input component; requires custom implementation

date-picker.comment: mat-datepicker for calendar-based date selection with multiple date adapter options

time-picker.comment: MatTimepicker introduced in Angular Material 19 for time selection with customizable intervals

date-range-picker.comment: mat-date-range-picker for selecting start and end dates

dropzone.comment: No built-in drag-and-drop file upload component; CDK drag-drop can be used for custom implementation

input-groups.comment: mat-form-field supports prefix, suffix, icons, and hints via matPrefix/matSuffix directives

input-with-dropdown.comment: Can combine mat-form-field with mat-select in suffix for composite inputs

button-groups.comment: mat-button-toggle-group for grouped/segmented buttons acting as a single control

split-button.comment: No built-in split button; can be composed with mat-button and mat-menu

table.comment: mat-table component for data tables using CDK table

data-table.comment: mat-table with mat-sort for sorting and mat-paginator for pagination; filtering via custom implementation

virtual-infinite-list.comment: CDK virtual scrolling (cdk-virtual-scroll-viewport) for virtualized lists; infinite scroll via scroll events

tree-view.comment: mat-tree for hierarchical expandable tree structures with flat and nested modes

list-view.comment: mat-list with mat-list-item for styled lists; supports navigation, selection, and action lists

card.comment: mat-card with mat-card-header, mat-card-content, mat-card-actions sub-components

avatar.comment: No dedicated avatar component; typically implemented with mat-icon or custom styling

badge.comment: matBadge directive for small status indicators on other elements

tag-chip-pill.comment: mat-chip-set with mat-chip for standalone chips/tags

calendar.comment: mat-calendar is internal to datepicker; no standalone calendar display component

alert.comment: No dedicated alert/banner component; snackbar serves notification purposes

toast-notification.comment: MatSnackBar service for temporary popup notifications with action buttons

progress-bar.comment: mat-progress-bar with determinate, indeterminate, buffer, and query modes

progress-circle.comment: mat-progress-spinner for circular progress indicators in determinate mode

spinner-loader.comment: mat-spinner (alias for mat-progress-spinner in indeterminate mode) for loading indicators

modal-dialog.comment: MatDialog service for centered overlay dialogs with animations

drawer-sheet.comment: mat-sidenav for side drawers; mat-bottom-sheet for bottom sheet panels

popover.comment: No built-in popover; CDK overlay can be used to build custom popovers

tooltip.comment: matTooltip directive for hover hint text with positioning options

dropdown-menu.comment: mat-menu for dropdown action menus triggered by matMenuTriggerFor

context-menu.comment: mat-menu can be triggered on contextmenu event for right-click menus

tabs.comment: mat-tab-group with mat-tab for horizontal tab-based content switching

vertical-tabs.comment: mat-tab-group only supports horizontal orientation; vertical tabs require custom styling

pagination.comment: mat-paginator for page navigation with configurable page sizes

stepper.comment: mat-stepper for multi-step processes with horizontal and vertical variants; linear and non-linear flows

navigation-menu.comment: mat-menu supports nested menus for site navigation

sidebar.comment: mat-sidenav within mat-sidenav-container for collapsible sidebar navigation

bottom-navigation.comment: No built-in mobile bottom navigation component; can be built with mat-toolbar

grid.comment: mat-grid-list for tile-based grid layouts with configurable columns and gutters

stack.comment: No built-in stack component; use CSS flexbox or Angular Flex Layout

container.comment: No built-in container component; use CSS or layout utilities

divider.comment: mat-divider for horizontal/vertical separators with inset option

collapsible.comment: mat-expansion-panel for expandable/collapsible content sections; accordion mode available

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integrations

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in charts; commonly used with ngx-charts, Chart.js, or ECharts

form-libraries.comment: Native integration with Angular's built-in Reactive Forms and Template-driven Forms; no external library needed

animation-libraries.comment: Uses Angular's built-in animation system (@angular/animations) for component transitions

icon-libraries.comment: mat-icon with built-in support for Material Icons font and SVG icons via MatIconRegistry

date-libraries.comment: DateAdapter abstraction with native JS Date, Luxon, Day.js, date-fns, and Moment.js adapters

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns; CDK a11y module provides accessibility utilities

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support; CDK FocusTrap and FocusMonitor for comprehensive keyboard navigation

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader compatibility prioritized across Windows, macOS, iOS, Android, and Chrome OS platforms

focus-management.comment: CDK provides cdkTrapFocus directive, FocusTrap service, and LiveAnnouncer for proper focus management

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG compliance level documented; emphasizes internationalized and accessible components

accessibility-rating.comment: Strong accessibility with dedicated CDK a11y module; ARIA-compliant components, screen reader tested, focus management; lacks formal WCAG certification

bundle-size-full.comment: Bundle size varies significantly based on imported modules; designed for tree-shaking individual components

bundle-size-core.comment: No core bundle; each component is a separate module imported individually

tree-shakeable.comment: Each component is a standalone module; production build tree-shakes unused components

zero-runtime.comment: Includes JavaScript runtime for components, animations, and CDK features

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be lazy-loaded via Angular's lazy loading modules with dynamic imports

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with comprehensive API reference, live examples, guides, schematics, and accessibility docs

interactive-docs.comment: Interactive examples for each component in documentation with StackBlitz integration

storybook.comment: No official Storybook; uses custom documentation site with interactive examples

figma-kit.comment: Material 3 Design Component Figma Library available on Figma Community

cli-generator.comment: ng add @angular/material for installation; ng generate @angular/material for component scaffolding

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: Approximately 1.76 million weekly downloads as of December 2025

commercial-support.comment: No official commercial support tier; maintained by Google's Angular team as open source

style-override.comment: Override via CSS classes, CSS custom properties (--mat-sys-*), and Sass mixins/variables

compound-components.comment: Many components use sub-component patterns: mat-card-header, mat-list-item, mat-tab, etc.

render-props.comment: Angular uses template references and structural directives instead of render props pattern

slots.comment: Content projection via ng-content and named slots throughout components

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled mode; CDK provides headless primitives (overlays, tables, drag-drop) for building custom components
